claim_to_carry: Current paper subset should be Jin Salt mainline, with continuation artifacts surfaced first and Kirst kept as historical provenance unless re-admitted.
current_paper_gap: The inspected paper repo still appears anchored to older June 15-22 evidence and has not absorbed the June 29 case policy.
limitations_or_caveats: Blocked and exploratory cases must remain visible as provenance, not silently dropped.
recommended_action: Update case matrix, source audit, and trust-boundary text before adding new figures.

claim_to_carry: The branch/station reduction contract for the admitted Salt subset is now explicit, including source roots, branch maps, and reduction-choice rows.
current_paper_gap: The current paper evidence map lists older campaign packages as primary anchors.
limitations_or_caveats: Mixed provenance remains: Salt 1 uses June 23 latest-window roots while Salt 2-4 reuse June 15 roots.
recommended_action: Add a provenance appendix table and cite exact staged/source roots.

claim_to_carry: Post-processing should be described as a hybrid 3D-to-1D reduction using mesh-derived masks and quality gates, not as a simple native-zone export.
current_paper_gap: The paper does not yet describe the latest cutting-plane limitations, p0 pressure definitions, or mesh-derived station handling.
limitations_or_caveats: OpenFOAM cuttingPlane bounds and station masking details are implementation-specific and should be summarized carefully.
recommended_action: Revise methods text and appendix definitions for p_rgh, corrected/static pressure, p0/total pressure, and branch masks.

claim_to_carry: Loop geometry and station provenance should come from mesh-derived centerlines rather than schematic probe CSV endpoints.
current_paper_gap: The paper has not yet adopted the July 1 geometry provenance correction.
limitations_or_caveats: Endpoint and fitting stations are excluded from straight-friction fits.
recommended_action: Add a geometry/provenance table and use this source in closure and ROM tables.

claim_to_carry: Salt 2/3/4 Jin OF13 thermal extraction gives lower-leg HTC about 252/269/288 W/m2-K, lower-leg UA' about 16.6/17.7/18.9 W/m-K, and upcomer Nu about 3.11/4.06/4.99.
current_paper_gap: Current paper tables contain older safe-branch values and do not include this OF13 continuation closure table.
limitations_or_caveats: No GCI yet; sign convention, low-temperature verification, and property-temperature review remain required.
recommended_action: Add as a caveated mainline Salt 2-4 table or appendix table; carry UA' as primary energy closure.

claim_to_carry: The upcomer is a buoyancy-driven recirculation/convection-cell region and should not be fit as ordinary straight-pipe friction.
current_paper_gap: The paper has some qualitative mechanism framing but lacks the current reversed-area fraction evidence.
limitations_or_caveats: Only the Jin Salt family is admitted; perturbation runs are not nominal baseline evidence.
recommended_action: Add quantitative reversed-area fractions and mark upcomer friction as outside the direct-friction closure set.

claim_to_carry: Pressure values must be classified by role before closure fitting; p_rgh, corrected/static pressure, p0/total pressure, direct friction, and buoyancy-contaminated apparent resistance are different objects.
current_paper_gap: The paper has not yet incorporated the July 1 pressure-role audit.
limitations_or_caveats: Variable-density buoyancy decomposition is not implemented.
recommended_action: Add as a methods/trust-boundary subsection; do not use buoyancy-contaminated rows as Darcy-f evidence.

claim_to_carry: The missing 1.4 in insulation boundary scenario exists locally, and compact model-form fits show useful side-by-side ROM behavior.
current_paper_gap: The paper does not yet include July 1 1D model-form comparisons.
limitations_or_caveats: The best mdot-only fit drives k90 to zero, so it is not a physical bend-loss claim; pressure and temperature scoring still missing.
recommended_action: Use for meeting/internal ROM comparison figures; defer paper claim until multi-objective scoring is complete.

claim_to_carry: A predictive 1D model needs experimental validation, measured uncertainties, and a sensor-to-model station contract.
current_paper_gap: The paper has not yet been updated with a concrete validation contract.
limitations_or_caveats: No experimental dataset has been reduced in this cycle.
recommended_action: Add as future-work and thesis-plan language after the CFD-only claims are bounded.
